steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “widespread, familiar practice” in the next sentence explicitly defines the state when clothing's purpose shifts from purely practical to social/cultural.

steps.title: Match the word to the meaning
steps.content:
Ubiquitous means everywhere and common, which directly captures “widespread, familiar practice.” Divisive (creates conflict), provisional (temporary), and feasible (possible) don't express the pervasiveness needed for clothes to gain cultural significance.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
